text:
New
Denis Grebennicov 3 minutes ago
@Denis i have a question - can pre-images purging drive deletes to
thousands per sec?
Yes, they can, depending on the version and depending on how many
pre-images one have (edited)
As mentioned in other threads in this channel, efficient pre-image
truncation has been released only in 7.2 version: SPM-3092
Alex Svatukhin 1 minute ago
This tracks
Version
7.0.32
Denis Grebennicov Just now
Meaning in versions prior to that when purging pre-images what we
do is: iterate over pre-images collection records and delete expired
images in batches
SPM-3092 enabled us to truncate data ranges without checking
individual records, think of moving from linear time related to pre-
images record count to almost constant time
